cached_blueprint:
# Sales Marketing Network — Detailed Architectural Blueprint

## Executive Summary

A collaborative, real-time Sales Marketing Network platform enabling distributed sales teams to co-manage leads, campaigns, and pipelines while providing deep analytics, automation, and performance intelligence. Built as a cloud-native, microservices-based web application with real-time collaboration features.

---

## 1. Technology Stack (Latest Versions as of 2025)

### Frontend
| Layer | Technology | Version |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Framework | Next.js (App Router) | 15.x |
| Language | TypeScript | 5.x |
| UI Components | shadcn/ui + Radix UI | Latest |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | 4.x |
| State Management | Zustand + TanStack Query | 5.x |
| Real-time | Socket.io Client / Ably | Latest |
| Charts/Analytics | Recharts + D3.js | Latest |
| Forms | React Hook Form + Zod | Latest |
| Tables | TanStack Table | 8.x |
| Drag & Drop | @dnd-kit | Latest |
| Notifications | Sonner | Latest |
| Auth UI | Clerk | Latest |

### Backend
| Layer | Technology | Version |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Runtime | Node.js | 22.x LTS |
| API Framework | Fastify | 5.x |
| Language | TypeScript | 5.x |
| ORM | Drizzle ORM | Latest |
| Real-time Server | Socket.io | 4.x |
| Job Queue | BullMQ | Latest |
| Validation | Zod | Latest |
| Auth | Clerk SDK | Latest |
| Search | Meilisearch | Latest |
| AI/ML | OpenAI SDK + LangChain.js | Latest |

### Data Layer
| Purpose | Technology | Version |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Primary DB | PostgreSQL | 16.x |
| Cache/Sessions | Redis (Upstash) | 7.x |
| Time-series Analytics | TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL extension) | Latest |
| File Storage | AWS S3 / Cloudflare R2 | Latest |
| Search Index | Meilisearch | Latest |
| Vector DB (AI) | pgvector (PostgreSQL extension) | Latest |

### Infrastructure
| Purpose | Technology |
|---------|-----------|
| Containerization | Docker + Docker Compose |
| Orchestration | Kubernetes (EKS) or Railway/Render |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |
| Monitoring | Grafana + Prometheus + Loki |
| Error Tracking | Sentry |
| CDN | Cloudflare |
| Email | Resend |
| SMS | Twilio |
| Payments | Stripe |

---

## 2. System Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        CLIENT LAYER                              │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │  Web App     │  │  Mobile PWA  │  │  Chrome Extension    │  │
│  │  (Next.js)   │  │  (Next.js)   │  │  (Lead Capture)      │  │
│  └──────┬───────┘  └──────┬───────┘  └──────────┬───────────┘  │
└─────────┼─────────────────┼──────────────────────┼─────────────┘
          │                 │                       │
┌─────────▼─────────────────▼───────────────────────▼─────────────┐
│                      API GATEWAY LAYER                            │
│              (Nginx / Cloudflare Workers)                         │
│         Rate Limiting | Auth Middlewar
